THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALVITES, WILLIAM MORNEAU, STEELY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT METHOUSE LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
